expert_opinions.summary: Adapter lacks a timeout on the streaming path; retry could double-charge if a side-effecting tool ran.
expert_opinions.recommendation: Add per-call timeout; assert no side-effect ran before retry.

expert_opinions.summary: Cost meter reads usage before checking for null usage block on provider fallback.
expert_opinions.recommendation: Guard against missing usage-accounting fields on fallback routes.

consensus_points: Retry safety needs an explicit no-side-effect assertion

unique_insights.insight: Fallback routes can omit usage-accounting fields.

synthesis.rationale: Union of independent findings; arbiter (Fable) adjudicated the disputed timeout severity.
